```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;text-align:left;">

 <div style="position:relative;background:rgba(255,184,77,0.08);border-left:5px solid #FFB84D;border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;padding:1.4em 1.7em 1.5em;">
  <div style="position:absolute;top:0.4em;left:0.7em;font-family:'Georgia',serif;font-size:5em;color:#FFB84D;line-height:0.7;opacity:0.18;user-select:none;">"</div>
  <div style="position:relative;font-size:0.95em;line-height:1.55;color:#F8F7F0;font-style:italic;font-family:'Georgia','TsangerJinKai',serif;">
   The most valuable content in any skill is the <span style="color:#FFB84D;font-style:normal;font-weight:700;">Gotchas</span> section.
  </div>
  <div style="margin-top:0.7em;text-align:right;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;">
   — Anthropic, <em>Building Skills for Claude</em>
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:1em;text-align:center;background:rgba(255,184,77,0.12);border:1px dashed rgba(255,184,77,0.4);border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 1em;font-size:0.75em;color:#F8F7F0;">
  Gotchas = where your <span style="color:#FFB84D;font-weight:700;">tribal knowledge</span> lives.
 </div>

</div>
```
